title: OTP Screen - Verify handling of expired OTP
description: Tests the system's response when a user tries to enter an OTP after its 10-minute validity period.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.
Simulate OTP expiry on the backend or wait for 10 minutes.

steps.description: 3. Enter the correct but now expired OTP.
4. Observe the screen for an error message.

expected_result: An error message like 'OTP expired. Please request a new one.' is displayed. The user is prompted to use the 'Resend OTP' link.
